pipeline_steps.action: Load monthly Parquet from Hugging Face
Standardize all timestamps to 24h datetime, timezone Europe/Berlin
Geocode unique eva station IDs to latitude/longitude
pipeline_steps.input: unique eva values from ICE data
pipeline_steps.api: Open-Meteo Geocoding API or Nominatim (documented in Notebook 04)

pipeline_steps.action: Fetch hourly weather per station-month from Open-Meteo Archive
pipeline_steps.cache_rule: Cache per station-month to avoid repeated API calls

pipeline_steps.action: Create merge keys on both sides
Left join weather onto railway rows

station_key.transform: lookup eva in station_coordinates.json → latitude, longitude
station_key.why: Railway data has eva but no coordinates; weather API needs lat/lon

time_key.transform: floor to hour in Europe/Berlin timezone
time_key.why: Open-Meteo returns hourly data. Planned departure (not actual) avoids target leakage.

location_key.note: API may snap coords to weather grid — use returned values

merge_keys.join_condition: railway.latitude  == weather.latitude AND railway.longitude == weather.longitude AND railway.departure_planned_hour == weather.time
merge_keys.join_type_rationale: Keep all ICE railway rows. Rows without weather match are flagged, not dropped.

merge_key_justification.eva_not_station_name: eva is a standardized numeric ID; station_name can be null or inconsistent
merge_key_justification.departure_planned_not_actual: Using arrival_change_time or departure_change_time would leak the delay outcome into the features — the actual time IS the delay
merge_key_justification.hour_not_minute: Weather variables are hourly aggregates; minute-level join would require interpolation not supported by the API
merge_key_justification.left_not_inner: Inner join would silently drop stops with missing weather, hiding data quality problems

validation_checks.rule: ≥ 90% of ICE rows have non-null weather values
validation_checks.action_if_fail: Investigate missing geocoding or date range gaps

validation_checks.rule: id column must be unique after merge
validation_checks.action_if_fail: Inspect join — weather side may have duplicate hours

validation_checks.rule: All timestamps in Europe/Berlin; no mixed UTC/local
Features must not include arrival_change_time, departure_change_time, or delay_in_min
validation_checks.action_if_fail: Remove leaky columns before modeling in Notebook 06

validation_checks.rule: Null weather should be random (geocoding gaps), not systematic by route
Row count after left join == row count before join
validation_checks.action_if_fail: Join created duplicates — inspect weather cache

columns_excluded_from_features: note: delay_in_min is regression TARGET; change times leak the outcome
